codes.label: Temporarily Unavailable
codes.description: Callee's device was reached but is currently unavailable (not registered, do-not-disturb, etc). May succeed on retry.

codes.label: Request Terminated
codes.description: Call was canceled/ended before being answered.

codes.label: Busy Here
codes.description: Callee is on another call. May succeed on retry once they hang up.

codes.label: Busy Everywhere
codes.description: Callee is busy or has do-not-disturb enabled across all their devices. May succeed once that's turned off.

codes.label: Request Timeout
codes.description: Server/network couldn't reach the destination in time. Usually a transient network issue.

codes.label: Server Timeout
codes.description: Upstream server took too long to respond. Same timeout bucket as 408 — usually transient.

codes.label: Server Internal Error
codes.description: Telephony server hit a transient internal error. Categorized as network_error — usually resolves on retry.

codes.label: Service Unavailable
codes.description: Telephony server is overloaded or temporarily down. Categorized as network_error — often self-resolves.

codes.label: Decline
codes.description: Callee explicitly rejected the call. May still succeed at a different time.
